overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative adventure game showing a female character exiting a building into a foggy, overcast boatyard during autumn. The character explores a rural harbor area with boats on stands, passing a parked van and observing a worker painting a large vessel, before proceeding into a narrow wooded path between stored boats.

events.description: character opens door and steps from indoor space to foggy outdoor boatyard
lighting shifts from dim artificial interior to natural diffused overcast daylight

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit door and stepping outside into the foggy harbor area

entered.detail: red illuminated exit sign above the doorway
open door frame leading to bright exterior
rustic wooden building with sloped roof visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dimly lit room with an exit sign visible. The character walks through a doorway, transitioning from the artificial interior lighting to the natural, diffused light of a foggy autumn morning outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor road with parked vehicles and outdoor seating

events.description: character turns slightly right to pass around the parked white van

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel path past a parked van toward a picnic area

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket sitting at wooden picnic table

entered.detail: large white commercial van parked on the side of the road
yellow painted fire hydrant near the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an asphalt path in the foggy boatyard, passing a white transit van parked on the right. A person in a red jacket sits at a wooden picnic table nearby as the character continues forward through the sparse, overcast harbor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open boat storage yard with vessels on stands

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the boatyard observing the various vessels and equipment

entered.detail: white fishing boat elevated on wooden stands and scaffolding
dark corrugated metal building with open entrance
derelict dark-colored sedan parked among the boats

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide, open boatyard area covered in gravel and scattered with fallen autumn leaves. Various boats rest on stands and trailers among traffic cones, with a metal garage building on the left and an abandoned car visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: boat maintenance area with large vessel under repair

events.description: character slows and circles around the large boat to observe the worker painting

agents.ego_description: approaching a large boat named Riva and observing a worker painting its hull

notable_agents.action: worker standing on ladder painting the side of the large white boat

entered.detail: large white fishing vessel with Riva name on bow, elevated on stands with yellow scaffolding
yellow metal scaffolding structure next to the boat
tree with bright red autumn foliage contrasting against the gray fog

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large white boat named Riva elevated on stands, where a worker stands on a ladder painting the hull. The character circles around the vessel, passing yellow scaffolding and observing the maintenance work, with a striking red-leaved tree visible in the foggy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooded path between stored boats

events.description: character enters narrow passage between two large boats, transitioning from open yard to enclosed trail

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow path between boat hulls toward a wooded area with a small shed

entered.detail: small rustic wooden shed with american flag visible in the distance
thick forest of evergreen and birch trees marking the edge of the boatyard

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open boatyard and enters a narrow, enclosed path between two large boat hulls. The ground transitions to a dirt trail with tall grass and overgrown vegetation, leading toward a small wooden shed nestled among dense forest trees at the edge of the harbor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit interior into a foggy, overcast boatyard that eventually narrows into a secluded wooded path. It begins inside a room with a visible exit sign, moving through a doorway as the artificial light shifts to the diffused, gray glow of an autumn morning. As the character advances along an asphalt path past a parked white van and a person at a picnic table, the environment opens into a wide gravel yard scattered with fallen leaves, traffic cones, and boats on stands. The camera then circles a large white vessel named Riva where a worker paints the hull from a ladder, passing yellow scaffolding against a backdrop of a striking red-leaved tree. Finally, the scene shifts from the open harbor into a narrow dirt trail between two large hulls, winding through tall grass and overgrown vegetation toward a small wooden shed nestled in the dense forest.
